-- in --
package test

templ hello(active bool) {
	<div
		if active {
			style="display:flex;color:red;"
		} else {
			style="display:none;color:blue;"
		}
	></div>
}

-- out --
package test

templ hello(active bool) {
	<div
		if active {
			style="display: flex; color: red"
		} else {
			style="display: none; color: blue"
		}
	></div>
}
